title: Where We First Met
subtitle: Just Long Enough to Matter
description: Ethan Carter is a quiet nineteen-year-old artist who notices the world in details most people miss. Cassandra Hailey is a bright, spontaneous redhead who lives like every moment matters. When their paths cross near a small town park, an ordinary day becomes the beginning of something neither of them expected. But Cassandra is carrying a secret that will slowly change the meaning of every moment they share.
shortDescription: A clean, emotional romance about first love, hidden pain, and the moments that matter most.

mainCharacters.name: Ethan Carter
mainCharacters.description: A freelance artist with a quiet soul, awkward charm, and a habit of seeing beauty where others rush past it.

mainCharacters.name: Cassandra Hailey
mainCharacters.description: A playful, red-haired girl who loves arcades, iced coffee, and spontaneous moments, while quietly carrying a life-altering secret.

author: StoryWeaver

chapters.title: Passing Lines
chapters.mood: Where an ordinary morning quietly changes everything.

chapters.title: The Pull Between Moments
chapters.mood: The kind of day that doesn't ask permission before becoming important.

chapters.title: Choosing Tomorrow
chapters.mood: The night after, and the choice it quietly becomes.

chapters.title: What Remains
chapters.mood: Between what she carries and what she almost says.

chapters.title: Something True
chapters.mood: Where something true gets said without quite saying it.

chapters.title: Among Others
chapters.mood: The relationship is no longer private — it's becoming part of the world.

chapters.title: What We Carry
chapters.mood: The truth is getting closer. And it will matter when it arrives.

chapters.title: Before the Answer
chapters.mood: Ethan may not know the truth… but he has already made his choice.

chapters.title: The Day Before
chapters.mood: She's ready. And everything is about to change.

chapters.title: This Kind of Night
chapters.mood: This is the happiest moment… before everything changes.

chapters.title: All of It
chapters.mood: The truth that hurts. The love that chooses anyway.

chapters.title: Mr. and Mrs. Carter
chapters.mood: Six months later. A ring, a chapel, and a forever that was always going to be them.

chapters.title: Every First
chapters.mood: The mountain, the cabin, and everything that was always waiting for them.

chapters.title: Still Here
chapters.mood: Everything they built — and the night it almost came apart.

chapters.title: Where We First Met
chapters.mood: The park, the mural, and everything she was.
